title: Vanuatu Boat Rental 2026: Costs, Seasons and Best Charter Boats
html:
Chartering a boat in Vanuatu offers access to remote anchorages around Efate and the outer islands, with skippered half-day trips from Port Vila Harbour starting at around EUR 120 per person. BoatHire24 connects you with local operators and verified listings so you can compare options before you book.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Vanuatu?

A shared island tour starts at around EUR 90 per person, while a private half-day motorboat trip costs from EUR 350. Prices depend on season, boat size, and whether you hire a skipper. To get the best rates, consider renting mid-week or during the shoulder months of May and October.

You can rent a boat in Vanuatu through BoatHire24 and compare verified listings with transparent pricing.

Where to set off in Vanuatu

Most charters depart from Port Vila on Efate Island. Other popular departure points include:

  • Port Vila Harbour (main hub for motor and sail charters)
  • Havannah Harbour (sheltered anchorage for catamaran trips)
  • Mélé Bay (close to Mélé Cascades and Hideaway Island)
  • Luganville on Santo (gateway to the SS President Coolidge wreck)
  • Rumahkek Lagoon (calm waters for novice skippers)

Which boat to rent

  1. Shared motorboat tour, Ideal for solo travellers or couples; capacity 8, 12 guests; from EUR 90 per person for a half-day.
  2. Private speedboat (Azimut 43), Great for small groups exploring nearby islands; 8 guests; from EUR 450 for a half-day.
  3. Catamaran (Lagoon 450), Stable and spacious for families; 10 guests plus crew; from EUR 700 for a full day.
  4. Crewed motor yacht (Mefasa 90), Luxury charter with full crew; 10 guests; from EUR 2,500 for a full day on this motor yacht listing.

What about season and licence requirements?

The peak season runs from July to September when the southeast trade winds blow steadily; the calmest months are December to April. Most charter operators include a local skipper, so you do not need a private licence. For bareboat charters, the operator will confirm the specific endorsements required; typically an ICC or equivalent is accepted.

An insider tip: book a sunset cruise in Havannah Harbour during the calm season, the light over the volcanic peaks is extraordinary and you might spot flying fish.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 90, 2,500 per person or per boat
  • Peak months: July to September (trade winds)
  • Trip length: Half or full day; weekly charters available
  • Capacity: 8, 12 guests on shared tours; up to 10 on private yachts
  • Currency: Euros (EUR) quoted; local currency also accepted

Cost breakdown, typical prices in EUR

  • Shared island tour (half day, per person): EUR 90, 120
  • Small motorboat (half day, private, up to 8 people): EUR 350, 500
  • Catamaran full day (private, up to 12): EUR 700, 1,000
  • Crewed luxury yacht (full day, up to 10): EUR 2,500, 4,000

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Vanuatu or list your own. For 2026, expect similar pricing to 2025 with possible increases of 5, 10%.

Questions about boat rental in Vanuatu

Can I rent a boat without a skipper in Vanuatu?

Yes, you can rent a bareboat if you hold a recognised ICC or equivalent, but most visitors choose a skippered charter for local knowledge.

What is the best month for sailing around Efate?

August offers consistent trade winds (15, 20 knots) and sunny weather, making it ideal for a week-long flotilla.

Are there all-inclusive charter options?

Some operators offer full-board packages including meals, drinks, and fuel; check the listing details on BoatHire24 before booking.

How far can I travel in a half-day charter from Port Vila?

A half-day motorboat can reach Pele Island or Hideaway Island, around 8, 12 nautical miles from Port Vila Harbour.

To start planning your trip, browse the listings on browse the listings and find the perfect boat for your Vanuatu adventure. If you own a vessel, you can also list your boat and reach thousands of travellers.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Vanuatu and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
